info.name: SILICON_HOUSE
info.description:
This collection contains the main API requests for the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. It is organized into functional areas such as authentication, product management, cart operations, order processing, and user administration, providing a structured way to test and manage both customer-facing and admin-only workflows across the application.

---

Full route coverage for the eCommerce backend,Set {{baseUrl}} to your running server (default [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000)). Log in once and the token auto-saves to {{token}} for every protected request.

item.name: Auth

request.description: Creates a new user account by sending the user’s registration details to the authentication endpoint. This request uses the POST method with a JSON body containing the user’s name, email, password, phone number, and role. It does not require authentication, which makes it suitable for onboarding new users into the system.
Authenticates a user with the provided credentials and establishes access to protected resources within the application.

item.description: This folder contains the core API requests for the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system, organized by feature area. It includes endpoints for **authentication** (login and registration), **product management** (listing, retrieving, creating, updating, and deleting products), **cart operations** (adding, updating, removing, clearing, and viewing cart items), **order processing** (checkout, viewing orders, retrieving order details, canceling orders, and updating order status), and **user management** (profile retrieval and update, plus admin-only user deletion). Overall, this folder serves as the main collection structure for testing and managing the application's customer and admin API workflows.

item.name: Users

request.description: Retrieves the profile information of the currently authenticated user from the `/users/profile` endpoint using the configured `{{baseUrl}}`. This request is intended to return the logged-in user's account details and is typically used after successful authentication to verify or display profile data.

Updates the authenticated user's profile information by sending revised personal details, such as name and phone number, to the `/users/profile` endpoint. This request is intended to let a signed-in user manage and keep their account information up to date.

Deletes a specific user account from the **SILICON_HOUSE** system. This admin-only request is intended for user management tasks, allowing authorized administrators to permanently remove user records when necessary.

item.description: This folder contains the user-related API requests for the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. It is used to manage user account information and profile operations, such as retrieving user details, updating profile data, and handling other account-specific actions. Overall, this folder helps organize the endpoints responsible for user management and personal account functionality within the application.

item.name: Products

formdata.value: LENOVO LEGION Pro 7 16IAX10H 83F500BBIN - Ultra 9 275HX (24C/24T) - Geforce RTX 5070TI 12G - 32GB DDR5 6400HZ (2*16) - 1TB Gen4 - 16, OLED, 2K, 240Hz - RGB Backlit - WIN11

16-inch gaming laptop powered by the Intel Core Ultra 9 275HX processor and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070 Ti 12 GB graphics, featuring a 240 Hz WQXGA OLED display with 100% DCI-P3 color coverage, 16 GB DDR5-6400 memory, a 1 TB PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD, Wi-Fi 7, and advanced cooling for high-end gaming, content creation, and AI-accelerated workloads.

item.description: This folder contains requests for managing products in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce API. It covers product-related operations such as retrieving product lists, viewing product details, and handling product creation, updates, and deletion, supporting both browsing and administrative management workflows.

item.name: Cart

request.description: Retrieves the current authenticated user’s shopping cart in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. This request is used to view all items currently added to the cart, along with their quantities and related product details, supporting cart review before checkout.

Adds a selected product to the authenticated user’s shopping cart in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. This request is used to begin or update the shopping process by placing an item into the cart for future checkout.

Updates an existing item in the authenticated user’s shopping cart in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. This request is typically used to change the quantity or details of a cart item, helping users manage their selected products before checkout.

Removes a specific item from the authenticated user’s shopping cart in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. This request is used to manage cart contents by deleting products the user no longer wants before proceeding to checkout.

Clears all items from the authenticated user’s shopping cart in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. This request is used to reset the cart completely, removing every selected product before checkout or when starting a new shopping session.

item.description: This folder contains requests for managing shopping cart operations in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce API. It includes endpoints for viewing cart contents, adding products to the cart, updating item quantities, removing items, and clearing the cart, supporting the full customer cart workflow before checkout.

item.name: Orders

exec:
const data = pm.response.json();
if (data && data._id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('orderId', data._id); }

request.description: Creates a new order from the authenticated user’s cart in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. This request is used during checkout to finalize the purchase process, converting selected cart items into an order for processing and fulfillment.

Retrieves all orders associated with the authenticated user in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. This request is used to view the user’s order history, track past purchases, and access order-related details for account management.

Retrieves the details of a specific order by its unique ID in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. This request is used to view complete information about an individual order, including its items, status, and related purchase details.

Updates the status of a specific order in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. This admin-only request is used to manage order processing stages such as pending, shipped, delivered, or canceled, helping administrators track and control fulfillment progress.

Cancels a specific order in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce system. This request is used to stop order processing for an existing purchase, typically before fulfillment is completed, allowing users or authorized roles to manage unwanted or changed orders.

item.description: This folder contains requests for managing order operations in the **SILICON_HOUSE** eCommerce API. It includes endpoints for creating orders through checkout, retrieving order lists and details, canceling orders, and updating order status, supporting both customer purchase flows and administrative order management.
